[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)

- Description: EC2 deploy + clasprc multi-account documentation
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/244
  
  Details:
  EC2 deploy + clasprc documentation, 2026-05-29.
  
  Two events:
  
  1. EC2 deploy of the queued autopilot PRs (gas_deploy_project tool from #61, AUTOPILOT_DEFAULT_ROLE from #62). deploy.sh ran clean: services restarted, /health ok, tokenomics cloned into context dir, AUTOPILOT_DEFAULT_ROLE wired, gas_deploy_project tool discovered in the capability manifest (32 tools total post-deploy). Two pre-existing import warnings noted but not blocking (paramiko, PIL — those tools (deploy_autopilot, qr_scanner) are excluded from discovery but the rest of the surface works).
  
  2. agentic_ai_context#244 — GOOGLE_API_CREDENTIALS.md documents Gary's per-account clasprc files set up earlier today: ~/.clasprc-gary.json (garyjob@agroverse.shop) and ~/.clasprc-admin.json (admin@truesight.me), both verified live via oauth2/v3/userinfo. Workflow: cp ~/.clasprc-<account>.json ~/.clasprc.json before deploy_gas_project.py --push; identity-pinning safety check from PR-1g gates on owner_email match. Also adds an 'Open follow-up — credential backup / vault' section noting that ~30 credential files across the workspace are unbacked off-host and proposing a Tier-1 age-encrypted-tarball backup approach.
  
  Autopilot is now on break for the day per Gary; safe to deploy at will.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
